title: お助けください、こっくり様！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Matikanefukukitaru and a few others
gather in a classroom around a ouija board.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Spirits abound, hear my plea! 'Tis only you who
can assist me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A precious lucky item has gone astray! Please
show me a sign to lead the way!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Calm down, Fukukitaru. Look, we're also here to
help, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Resorting to a ouija board to find a lost item? I
guess that's the Fukukitaru we know.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I suppose, but... she seems a lot more panicky
today. Let's stick with her until she's gotten it out
of her system.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now then! Be fair and true!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O spirits, I declare! I beseech you—of your
presence, let us be aware!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ten-yen coin begins to slowly move as if in
response to Matikanefukukitaru's pleas!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eek?! It r-rolled out from underneath our fingers!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A spirit has descended! Woiyaaaaa! Haiyaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please tell me where my precious item of good
fortune lies!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The ten-yen coin begins to slide again, stopping
over three letters—"P," "O," and "T."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, yes, yes, YEEEEES! The spirit has
spoken!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That spells "pot"! As in "cook or put away the
pot"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now we're cooking! But we're gonna have to work for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Is that how you use a ouija board? Aren't
we supposed to wait for it to completely spell out
the answer?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru seems... a lot more panicked than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All shall be solved if I follow your guidance, O
wise spirit! What must I do?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They continue to use the ouija board,
Fukukitaru-style.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
E! As in... "endure exercise"?! Okay, then! I'll do
thirty squats!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
R! "Run over to get a drink"! The perfect reward
after my second set of thirty squats! I'm sure we'll
find some kind of hint if we do that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
T! That must mean the "tree stump"! I'm sure that
will lead the way to my handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAHHHHH! I can't find it anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's about time we tell her that she's doing
it wrong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...How about we look for your handkerchief the
old-fashioned way?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O spirit so great! My academy life depends on my
lucky item!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've—sniff!—made such amazing friends thanks to its blessings!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As such, it's essential to me! Pleeeeease! I'm
begging you, Great Spirit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was a lucky item to boost her fortune in
friendship. Her friends feel conflicted now having
learned the reason for Matikanefukukitaru's state
of panic.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thanks to that... item, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! You two look so serious! Is something
wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...It's a long story, but helping you find your
precious item is our priority.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Let's try searching the dorms and cafeteria
again.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! How amazing are these friends of mine! I'm
blessed beyond belief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Matikanefukukitaru gushes about her
friends, she looks toward the sky. In that
moment...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
OHHHH! THAT TREETOP! My handkerchief is
stuck up there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have the glorious spirit to thank for this! Many
thanks, many thanks, O spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you thanking the spirit for?
"P-O-T-E-E-R-T" doesn't mean anything.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But "P-O-T-E-E-R-T" backwards is...
"treetop..."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No way...
